# Creative Konsoles

> Precision software for AI, audio, and data. Tools that think with you.

Creative Konsoles builds specialized tools at the intersection of biometric intelligence, AI synthesis, behavioral science, and creative production. Founded by Jeremiah Smith.

## Tools

- [5i — Parallel AI Synthesis Engine](https://5i.creativekonsoles.com): Five frontier AI models run in parallel on every query. Disagreements are exposed, consensus is highlighted. Built for decisions where certainty matters.
- [DAW Doctor](https://dawdoctor.creativekonsoles.com): Diagnostic and reference tool for music producers. Identifies DAW conflicts, plugin issues, and provides repair guidance with AI-assisted analysis.
- [Memoir](https://memoir.creativekonsoles.com): Voice-to-memory system. Speak your thoughts; the system transcribes, structures, and stores them as searchable memory.
- [Gain](https://gain.creativekonsoles.com): Behavioral intelligence mixer. Adjust behavioral parameters across individuals, teams, and organizations. Enterprise AI control layer.
- [StreamFader](https://stream.creativekonsoles.com): Live stream production tool. Real-time audio and visual mixing for content creators.
- [Equil](https://equil.creativekonsoles.com): Biometric sacred-geometry visualizer. Apple Watch biometrics drive generative geometry and responsive audio in real time.

## Company

- [Homepage](https://creativekonsoles.com): Company overview and product directory
- [Custom Build](https://build.creativekonsoles.com): Commission custom tools ($500–$2k). We build fast.
- [5i User Guide](https://creativekonsoles.com/5i-guide.html): How to use the 5i parallel synthesis engine
- [Terms of Service](https://creativekonsoles.com/terms.html): Legal terms
- [Contact](mailto:support@creativekonsoles.com): support@creativekonsoles.com

## About

Creative Konsoles is a boutique software studio. Every tool ships with a specific purpose — no bloat, no feature-padding. The focus is on tools that surface insight, reduce cognitive load, and extend what a person can do with the information they already have.

- Founder: Jeremiah Smith
- GitHub: https://github.com/papjamzzz
- Twitter / X: https://x.com/RealRealEyes
